narrative.context: You see a peer’s success post and feel jealousy and self-doubt. You’re tempted to comment negatively or shut down.
narrative.prompt: What is the most effective way to manage this emotion?

options.label: Name it, reframe, and choose a value-aligned action
options.description: Acknowledge jealousy without judging it; reframe as a signal of your goals; take one small step toward your own plan.

ei.rationale: Regulates comparison-driven emotion through acceptance + reframing; redirects to constructive behavior.

options.label: Mute the account for now
options.description: Reduce triggers temporarily and return later when calmer.

ei.rationale: Manages exposure to triggers; helpful short-term but may avoid processing long-term.

options.label: Vent to others repeatedly
options.description: Complain about unfairness and compare yourself constantly.

ei.rationale: Sustains jealousy and self-doubt; weak regulation.

options.label: Leave a spiteful comment
options.description: Post something negative to reduce your discomfort.

ei.rationale: Impulsive discharge harms relationships and doesn’t manage emotion effectively.
